title: syntherisma royleana
intro: Syntherisma royleana, a plant species native to the Himalayan region, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is also known as the 'Himalayan dandelion' due to its resemblance to the common dandelion. Syntherisma royleana has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including aiding digestion, reducing fever, and supporting liver function, and is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption.
